subject: fix(api): send snake_case field names in API request bodies
body:
The tool-till-tees backend expects snake_case JSON keys. Updated all
API client functions to send snake_case field names over the wire:
- inviteCounterparty: projectId‚Üíproject_id, counterpartyEmail‚Üícounterparty_email, passphraseLink‚Üípassphrase_link
- splitAgreement: moduleIds‚Üímodule_ids, newTitle‚Üínew_title
- batchToggleReadyToSign: moduleIds‚Üímodule_ids
- resolveProposal: responseContent‚Üíresponse_content
- createVerification: agreementId‚Üíagreement_id

Tags: api, bugfix, snake-case
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: api
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: backend-integration
Semver: patch
